---
title: "Orbis Intellectual Property"
page-layout: article
---

# Orbis Intellectual Property

**Provider:** Moody's

## Description

Patent and company intelligence platform linking global patent data to corporate information. Supports research on innovation, intellectual property, technology strategy, and firms.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=https://orbisip-r1.bvdinfo.com/ip)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
